why_it_matters: This 1.0.0 Capacitor package release is the first stable Capacitor-first product cut of Legato, aligning contract, Android core, iOS distribution, runtime parity, lifecycle, authenticated media, and streaming semantics.
user_impact: Capacitor consumers can adopt a stable 1.0.0 package line with explicit scope, durable release communication, and verified Android/iOS behavior.
upgrade_notes: Upgrade to @ddgutierrezc/legato-capacitor@1.0.0 and pair it with @ddgutierrezc/legato-contract@1.0.0. Regenerate/sync native hosts to pick up the latest iOS and Android distribution references.
breaking_changes: No new breaking changes relative to the final 0.1.x line; 1.0.0 formalizes the supported Capacitor-first scope and its documented limits.
highlights: Android and iOS runtime/lifecycle/parity/authenticated-media/streaming semantics all aligned to the published package.
Release governance, changelog, and GitHub release communication are now part of the supported process.
known_limitations: Flutter and React Native remain post-1.0 roadmap items.
Advanced DRM/token refresh and deep process-death restore remain post-1.0 work.
